patterns.description: The agent re-runs nearly identical probe commands across consecutive turns against slightly different interpreters or paths without first performing the discovery step that would have told it where the target package actually lives. Each retry observes the same failure mode before the agent finally pivots to the correct diagnostic — a search that should have preceded the first attempt rather than followed the third.

The agent continues reading progressively deeper into the call chain (many Grep/Read calls descending through helper functions) well after it has already identified the actual bug site. The extra exploration does not meaningfully refine the diagnosis and partly serves as rationalization/re-derivation of a conclusion reached earlier — or, in the worst case, of a conclusion it ultimately imports from an external reference rather than deriving itself.

Rather than decomposing the problem at its root, the agent patches every observed symptom in a single large post-processing block. The final edit conflates multiple concerns and re-implements semantics the library internals already provide, rather than fixing the root cause at the correct callsite.

In the onlycode arm (where the Edit tool is unavailable), the agent modifies production source by writing multi-hundred-line Python scripts that do content.replace(old, new) or slice lines[start:end] with hardcoded line indices. Several of these failed silently due to whitespace mismatches or shifting line indices between edits, making rewrites unauditable and causing multiple self-inflicted buggy intermediate states.

The agent makes multiple successive edits to the same code region, each revising the previous approach as new edge cases surface. The churn reflects that the agent did not reason through the full input matrix before committing to an edit, and it only stabilizes on a final approach after consulting an external reference. Intermediate attempts are discarded wholesale rather than incrementally refined.

The agent assumes properties of the runtime environment (which Python interpreter has the target package, whether pip/pytest are on PATH, which site-packages are active) without first probing, and only discovers each mistaken assumption after a failed invocation. Each assumption is corrected reactively turn-by-turn rather than being established up front with a single environment discovery step.

After applying code edits, the agent fails to execute the actual target tests that would confirm behavioral correctness. Instead it substitutes weaker surrogates — visual diff comparison against a reference commit, inspect.getsource dumps, or ad-hoc AST shape probes — and declares the fix verified despite never successfully running the relevant test.

The agent wraps nearly every simple shell command in the Monitor background-task tool, then issues a follow-up sleep + cat to retrieve results. This converts what should be one synchronous Bash call into 2–3 calls with artificial waits, massively inflating turn count and adding latency without providing any benefit over direct execution.

The agent searches git history for prior commits touching the affected code, discovers the upstream fix commit for the exact issue, retrieves the canonical patch via git show, and transcribes it nearly verbatim as its own solution. This short-circuits the agent's own derivation even where earlier reasoning was on the right track.
